commit_message: feat: admin dashboard redesign with role-based personalities
description:
Admin redesign with two role-based layouts:
- Super Admin: Linear.app-style left sidebar
- School Admin: Duolingo for Schools top tabs
Removed fantasy background and decorative overlays.
Reads user role from localStorage on DOMContentLoaded for instant layout detection.
files_changed: admin.html - New dual-layout structure, removed fantasy background and decor-overlay
admin-init.js - Reads localStorage on DOMContentLoaded, no longer waits for window.currentUser
styles.css - Added admin-layout-super/school with background-image override
note: Save the commit hash after push (git log --oneline -1) to revert specific commit if needed
